3170080.name: End Of Death: Prison
3170080.description:
The zombie apocalypse has arrived. This prison could be a good refuge, but first, you need to clear it out.

End Of Death: Prison is a first-person shooter game set in a prison during a zombie apocalypse. The goal of the game is to eliminate all enemies in the area (zombies) using various weapons that the player can find throughout the map, including both melee weapons and firearms. The player can also find and use ammunition and health items. Additionally, the player can interact with elements of the environment, such as doors and stairs. The player will face certain limitations, such as a health limit, a stamina limit, and a limit on the number of items they can carry.
3170080.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
